articles.title: Indonesia’s Rupiah Slides to Record, Stocks Tumble With Bonds
articles.summary: The Indonesian rupiah fell to a new all-time low, stocks slid and bond yields surged as oil prices advanced and as local markets reopened after a two-day holiday.
